core.label: SAS Fundamentals
core.description: DATA steps, PROC steps, and statistical analysis.

topics.label: SAS Environment
topics.description: SAS Studio or SAS Enterprise Guide. SAS is the standard in pharma and government.

topics.label: DATA Step
topics.description: INPUT, SET, IF/THEN, DO loops, OUTPUT. The DATA step reads and transforms data.

topics.label: Variables & Data Types
topics.description: Numeric and character variables. LENGTH, FORMAT, INFORMAT, LABEL.

topics.label: PROC Steps
topics.description: PROC PRINT, PROC SORT, PROC FREQ, PROC MEANS, PROC SUMMARY.

topics.label: PROC SQL
topics.description: SQL within SAS for queries, joins, and subqueries.

topics.label: Statistical Procedures
topics.description: PROC REG, PROC LOGISTIC, PROC ANOVA, PROC TTEST. SAS's statistical power.

topics.label: ODS (Output Delivery)
topics.description: ODS HTML, PDF, RTF for formatted output and reports.
